TimeEntry.Title: 365 Licenses and Users List
TimeEntry.Notes: As instructed by Ajay, I carried out a license optimization task for the Strategic Air Services client to improve resource management and reduce costs. I logged into their Microsoft 365 Admin Center and identified all old or inactive employee accounts still consuming active licenses. Each of these accounts was converted into a shared mailbox to preserve email history and accessibility for the team. After successfully converting the mailboxes, I carefully removed their Microsoft 365 licenses to ensure there were no unnecessary charges. This cleanup provided better visibility and accountability of licenses across the tenant while maintaining data accessibility for reference or future use.

TimeEntry.Title: Resolved ManageEngine Agent Greyed-Out Issue for Matyas & RyansWin11
TimeEntry.Notes:
Reviewed the ManageEngine portal and found that the machines Matyas and RyansWin11 were showing as offline with a greyed-out status. Checked and restarted the ManageEngine services, but there was no change.

Then verified the firewall settings through the command line and restarted the services again on the machines. After refreshing the ManageEngine portal, both machines appeared online.

Issue resolved. Hence, closing the ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patches ChadMorris,Kevin-Maahs,RyansWin11
TimeEntry.Notes:
Devices were showing non-compliant status due to missing patches in the ManageEngine console for the systems ChadMorris, Kevin-Maahs & RyansWin11.

Logged into the ManageEngine portal and reviewed the missing updates. Downloaded and manually deployed the required patches, including:

  • Cisco Secure Client Diagnostics and Reporting Tool (5.1.13.177) – Manual upload and installation completed.

  • Google Chrome Enterprise (x64) – googlechromestandaloneenterprise64_145.0.7632.110.msi

  • Microsoft Defender Security Intelligence Update – mpam-fe-defender-x64.exe

  • Intel Graphics Driver Package – PCI__VEN_8086_DEV_4692.cab

Completed the installation on all affected systems and verified the updated versions.

Performed a post-installation scan, and the devices are now showing compliant status with no pending missing patches in the ManageEngine console.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine Synchronization Issue for SAS Machines:ChadMorris,Kevin-Maahs, MattW, RyansWin11
TimeEntry.Notes:
Observed a synchronization issue in Manage Engine on the following machines:

ChadMorris,Kevin-Maahs, MattW, RyansWin11

Action Taken:

  • Logged into the Manage Engine portal and reviewed the device status.
  • Identified synchronization issues on the above machines.
  • Performed necessary troubleshooting steps to re-sync the agents with the server.
  • Verified connectivity and ensured communication between agents and Manage Engine server.

Outcome:

  • Synchronization issue has been resolved.
  • All machines are now properly syncing with Manage Engine.
  • Systems are working as expected.
